## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and explained.
- [ ] I tested or validated the change, or explained why testing does not apply.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private data, malware, backdoors, or destructive payloads.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when needed.
- [ ] This PR is ready for @GreyNOC or authorized maintainer/Codex-assisted review.
